summary: Frontend auth modal validation testing complete. Verified sonner toast integration fix is working correctly. All inline error messages display properly with AlertCircle icons and red text styling.

ui_bugs.issue: Empty field validation shows browser's native 'Please fill out this field' tooltip instead of inline error messages. This is because the inputs have HTML 'required' attribute that triggers native validation before JavaScript validation runs.

empty_fields_inline_errors.details: All 7 inline error messages show correctly: firstName, lastName, email, phone, password, confirmPassword, agreeTerms. Each error has AlertCircle icon and red text.

mismatch_password_error.details: Error message 'Les mots de passe ne correspondent pas' shows under confirmPassword field when passwords don't match

error_clearing_on_type.details: Errors clear when user starts typing in the field that had an error

incorrect_credentials.details: Shows general error banner 'Identifiants incorrects' AND sonner toast notification

error_toast.details: Sonner toast notifications display at bottom-right of screen for error messages

toaster_component.details: <Toaster /> from sonner is correctly placed in App.js line 180 and receives toast() calls

tab_switching.details: Switching between Sign up and Sign in tabs resets form fields and clears all errors

booking_flow_auth_modal.details: Selecting a car on /car-selection page without being logged in opens auth modal with Sign in form

test_scenarios_executed: TEST 1: Submit signup form with all empty fields - inline errors appear (7/7)
TEST 2: Submit signup form with mismatched passwords - correct French error shown
TEST 3: Type in field with error - error clears automatically
TEST 4: Switch tabs Sign up -> Sign in -> Sign up - form resets and errors clear
TEST 5: Submit signin form with empty fields - native browser validation triggers (minor issue)
TEST 6: Submit signin form with incorrect credentials - error banner AND toast shown
TEST 7: Navigate Home -> fill booking form -> car-selection -> click Select - auth modal opens
action_items: OPTIONAL: Remove 'required' HTML attribute from signin form inputs to allow custom inline validation to show instead of browser native validation
critical_code_review_comments: sonner toast integration is correctly implemented - toast() from sonner works with <Toaster /> in App.js
Inline error messages using FieldError component with data-testid='error-{field}' pattern - all working
Error clearing on input change via handleChange function - working correctly
Form reset on tab switch via resetForm() in handleSwitchMode - working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 95% (6.5/7 tests passed - signin empty field validation uses browser native instead of inline)

provided_credentials.note: Credentials returned 400 error from C# API - possibly expired or incorrect

context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth form validation testing complete. Sonner toast integration verified working. Main fix (useToast -> sonner toast) confirmed functional. Sign-in form has minor issue where browser native validation fires before custom validation due to HTML 'required' attribute on inputs.

mocked_api.note: No APIs are mocked. Auth endpoints go to real C# backend at api.zont.cab via /api/proxy/auth/*
